name: Shining Star Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>輝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かがや</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ける<ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During your opponent's Main Phase, if this card is in your hand (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Dragon Synchro Monster in your GY; Special Summon this card, and if you do, Special Summon that monster but negate its effects, then immediately after this effect resolves, you can Synchro Summon 1 Dragon Synchro Monster using this card you control. You can only use this effect of "Shining Star Dragon" once per turn. A Dragon monster that was Synchro Summoned using this card as material cannot be destroyed by battle.
mnst_eff: During your opponent's Main Phase, if this card is in your hand (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Dragon Synchro Monster in your GY; Special Summon this card, and if you do, Special Summon that monster but negate its effects, then immediately after this effect resolves, you can Synchro Summon 1 Dragon Synchro Monster using this card you control. You can only use this effect of "Shining Star Dragon" once per turn. A Dragon monster that was Synchro Summoned using this card as material cannot be destroyed by battle.
eff: During your opponent's Main Phase, if this card is in your hand (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Dragon Synchro Monster in your GY; Special Summon this card, and if you do, Special Summon that monster but negate its effects, then immediately after this effect resolves, you can Synchro Summon 1 Dragon Synchro Monster using this card you control. You can only use this effect of "Shining Star Dragon" once per turn. A Dragon monster that was Synchro Summoned using this card as material cannot be destroyed by battle.

action: Uses itself as a Synchro Material
Applies effect when used as Synchro Material
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
